slides.headline: Every time a licensed placement airs anywhere in the

slides.body:
Those royalties have to go somewhere. KENYA 🇰🇪
MCSK — Music Copyright Society of Kenya GHANA 🇬🇭
GHAMRO — Ghana Music Rights Organisation Register this week.
Without PRO registration, they go uncollected — permanently. You register with your home society — they collect internationally through reciprocal agreements.

Here's the definitive breakdown for African composers. ↓ THE KEY RULE:
Register before your first placement. Not after.

NIGERIA 🇳🇬
COSON — primary collection society for compositions
Also register with: PRS for Music (UK), ASCAP or BMI (US)

SOUTH AFRICA 🇿🇦
SAMRO — compositions and publishing royalties
CAPASSO — neighbouring rights (master recordings)

slides.headline: Open briefs. Every Tuesday.
slides.body: Composers: apply once, get matched for life. Supervisors: shortlist in 48h.
